findings.title: Repeated corrections in human-sense
findings.body: You corrected the agent 38 times this window around around. Encoding the rule once stops the loop.

findings.title: Re-ask rate is high in human-sense
findings.body: 78% of your turns were rapid corrections. Front-loading the goal and constraints cuts the back-and-forth.
findings.improvement: Stating the goal and constraints in the first prompt removes the rounds spent narrowing intent.
findings.agentBenefit: The agent has the context it needs and stops guessing or repeating failures.
findings.userBenefit: You spend fewer turns correcting assumptions, repeated questions, or missed state.
findings.reflection: Whether human-sense's friction drops in the next cycle.
findings.action: Start human-sense prompts with the goal + constraints up front to cut the 78% re-ask rate.
